mapper.select: SELECT A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SWHOISREQUESTID , A.NWHOIS_SEQ , A.SNETTYPE , A.RNUM FROM ( SELECT A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SWHOISREQUESTID , A.NWHOIS_SEQ , A.SNETTYPE , ROWNUM RNUM FROM ( SELECT A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SWHOISREQUESTID , A.NWHOIS_SEQ , A.SNETTYPE FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS A WHERE (A.PIP_PREFIX >>= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_ADDRESS(#{ssearchIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SIP FROM DUAL) OR A.PIP_PREFIX <<= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_ADDRESS(#{ssearchIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SIP FROM DUAL) ) AND A.SREQUEST_CD != '03' -- 삭제신청서 제외 AND A.SWHOISRESULT_CD = '04' -- 등록완료(KISA) ORDER BY PIP_PREFIX ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{lastIndex} ) A WHERE RNUM >= #{firstIndex}

SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS A WHERE (A.PIP_PREFIX >>= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_ADDRESS(#{ssearchIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SIP FROM DUAL) OR A.PIP_PREFIX <<= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_ADDRESS(#{ssearchIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SIP FROM DUAL) ) AND A.SREQUEST_CD != '03' -- 삭제신청서 제외 AND A.SWHOISRESULT_CD = '04' -- 등록완료(KISA)

SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS_MODIFY A WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSTAT_CD = '10' AND A.SFIRST_ADDR = #{sfirstAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.SLAST_ADDR = #{slastAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND (A.PIP_PREFIX >>= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_ADDRESS(#{searchWrd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SIP FROM DUAL) OR A.PIP_PREFIX <<= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_ADDRESS(#{searchWrd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SIP FROM DUAL) )

SELECT A.SNET_NM , A.SNETTYPE , A.SSERVICEGB , A.SUSERORGGB , A.SSVCLOC , A.SSVCCOMMNET , NVL(A.SIP_TYPE, 'STATIC') AS SIP_TYPE FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS A WHERE A.SWHOISREQUESTID = #{swhoisrequestid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.SNET_NM , A.SNETTYPE , A.SSERVICEGB , A.SUSERORGGB , A.SSVCLOC , A.SSVCCOMMNET , NVL(A.SIP_TYPE, 'STATIC')
